'''Oshetti IV''' was a [[Swamp/Legends|swampy]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. Its inhabitants used [[dried swamp hemp]], which contained bioluminescent [[Bacteria/Legends|bacteria]], to create the glowing fabric known as [[illuminescence]].

{{Planet-stub}}
